subject: feat(hero): add finite pulse animation to tagline
body:
Add a custom animate-pulse-3 animation that pulses 3 times then stops,
applied to the "Jack of all trades..." tagline for a subtle entrance effect.
Uses Tailwind v4 CSS-first @theme config with finite iteration count.

Tags: styling, animation, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: loading-spinners
Semver: minor
